why_sufficient: These files cover the existing stub, routing config, pattern reference component, styling, and the breakpoint hook needed to implement the Experiences page per spec.
summary: Implement the Experiences page at `/experiences` by building out the existing `Experiences.tsx` stub into a full project showcase grid. The component will feature a 2x2 card layout with placeholder images, tags, titles, and descriptions, using Fanwood Text font and inline CSSProperties with CSS custom properties. Background switches between grid.png (desktop) and image_frame2.png (mobile) via the useBreakpoint hook. GSAP ScrollTrigger animations follow Frame4.tsx patterns for header fade-in, card stagger, and CTA fade-in. Routing integration in main.tsx and App.tsx ensures the navbar "experiences" link navigates correctly. Layout is responsive: 2-col desktop, 1-col phone. No new dependencies required.
